setup.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your organization for meeting intelligence
setup.startHereTitle: Start here: what to fill first
setup.startHereStep1: Step 1 (required): Organization name used across your workspace.
setup.startHereStep2: Step 2 (recommended): Add your name and contact email for invitations and notifications.
setup.startHereStep3: Step 3: Review details and create your organization.
setup.startHereTip: Tip: Use a real team email to receive reminders and escalation digests.
setup.organizationNameHelp: Required. Use your company, team, or department name. Example: Product Team APAC.
setup.contactNameHelp: Recommended. Helps identify organization owner and default contact person.
setup.contactEmailHelp: Recommended. Used for reminders, invitations, and important updates.
setup.emailForUpdates: Your email for important updates and invitations
setup.reviewHelp: Please confirm all details before creating. You can update organization settings later.

dashboard.setupComplete: You're all set up. Start by selecting an organization or create a new one.
dashboard.noOrganizations: No organizations yet. Create one to get started!
dashboard.projectsOnHandDesc: Focus on projects you own and jump directly into management workflows.
dashboard.projectValidation: Project code and name must be at least 2 characters.
dashboard.recordMeetingsDesc: Capture and transcribe your meetings automatically
dashboard.aiAnalysisDesc: Get AI-powered summaries and action items
dashboard.trackActionsDesc: Never miss an action item or deadline

features.notAvailable: This feature is not available with your current plan. Upgrade to access this feature.

continuity.title: Project Continuity Dashboard
continuity.description: Monitor project health, overdue items, and action item progress

reminders.title: Reminder Operations
reminders.description: View reminder digests and escalation metrics
reminders.selectDigest: Select a digest to view details

aiTrace.title: Ask-AI Trace Panel
aiTrace.description: Inspect AI run traces, evidence, and debugging information
aiTrace.selectLog: Select an AI run log to view details and trace information

settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: Configure global backend behavior and AI runtime options.

aiChat.title: AI Chat
aiChat.description: Prompt, record, diarize, and analyze from your dashboard.

recording.recordHelp: Record first, then edit transcript lines if speech or translation is incorrect.
recording.audioOnlyFallback: Recording audio only (browser has no speech recognition API).
recording.recordingActive: Recording... auto speaker grouping is running.
recording.transcriptionComplete: Whisper transcription complete. Edit transcript if needed, then click Analyze Transcript.
recording.whisperTimeoutInfo: Whisper timed out. Using browser transcript fallback.
recording.whisperTimeoutReady: Whisper timed out. Browser transcript is ready. Edit it if needed, then click Analyze Transcript.
recording.whisperDisabledInfo: Whisper is disabled by system settings. Using browser transcript fallback.
recording.whisperDisabledReady: Whisper is disabled. Browser transcript is ready. Edit it if needed, then click Analyze Transcript.
recording.transcriptHelp: Edit this text directly, then click Analyze Transcript.

errors.addTranscriptBeforeAnalyze: Please add transcript lines before analyze
